what_it_does: This file is a channel-memory attachment record that associates attachment att-482db76f, of type board_items, with board item item-e7c8946c in the dragnet-development channel, recording when it was added.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
The target is expressed as a board:// URI pointing to item-e7c8946c.
The added timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone offset.
The id in the frontmatter matches the filename stem.
standouts: The target uses a board:// URI scheme to reference an external board item.
The file is purely a typed pointer/edge with no payload.
It links channel-memory to a board item rather than storing the item inline.
conventions: Uses an id that matches the filename.
Uses an ISO 8601 timestamp with explicit timezone.
Uses a URI-style identifier for the referenced target.
concerns: No body or explanatory content is present.
The referenced board item is not included or summarized.
No author, source message, or reason for the attachment is recorded.
notes: A metadata-only attachment stub that points a board item into the dragnet-development channel memory.
questions: What content or state does board item item-e7c8946c represent?
What are the exact semantics of the board_items attachment_type?
Was this attachment created automatically or manually?
Why is there no descriptive note or payload alongside the pointer?
purpose_vs_actual: No explicit purpose is stated; the content is consistent with referencing a board item.
intention_signals: It appears to create a durable, typed link between a channel-memory attachment and a specific board item so that board content can be located from the channel context.
novelty: The use of a board:// URI scheme as the target and the absence of any payload make this a pure pointer record.
contribution: It contributes a typed reference edge from channel memory to a board item, preserving the relationship and the addition timestamp for fusion.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment metadata file of type board_items that references board item item-e7c8946c in the dragnet-development channel and records an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To persist a typed link between a channel-memory attachment and a board item for later retrieval or correlation.
